MINI MINUTES: ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING

Appearances via Zoom:
Michael D. Schulman of the Law Offices of Michael D. Schulman (818.999.5553) for judgment creditor and moving party NDS, LLC;
No other appearances.

Mr. Schulman informs the court that the parties are moving towards settlement and requests a two-week continuance of the matter. The court continues the motion to April 29, 2026. Mr. Schulman to give notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Michael D. Schulman, Esq. appearing for Assignee NDS, LLC

Hearing held.

The Court presents counsel with questions that was not address on the moving papers.
Moving party orally responds and requests a continuance of the motion to submit supplemental documentation for the court.

Good cause appearing, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the motion to April 15, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. for moving party to submit supplemental declarations in support of the motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
